subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, luminous leaf! Although numerous spiritual letters have hitherto been addressed to thy name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله الورقه النورانیه هر چند تا بحال نامه های متعدد روحانی بنام نامی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @education of children; moral education, @role and station of women, @spiritual transformation
